# Cryptic Store

> Sacramento-based online boutique and entertainment brand by DJ MC Mysterious.

Cryptic Store is an online boutique and creative brand rooted in Sacramento, California. Founded by DJ & artist MC Mysterious, it blends streetwear fashion, DJ services, music, and spiritual lifestyle into one brand experience.

## Collections
- **Dare2Wear**: Bold graphic streetwear — tees, leggings, boxer briefs & apparel designed in Sacramento.
- **Imitable Lives**: Ancient luxury meets modern streetwear — premium urban fashion.
- **You Know We Do Magic**: Mystical and spiritual lifestyle products — crystals, candles, incense & curated items.

## Services
- **DJ Services**: Professional DJ MC Mysterious available for Sacramento weddings, corporate events, parties & private functions.
- **Music**: Original hip-hop music, beats & tracks by MC Mysterious.

## Key Info
- Location: Sacramento, California
- Free shipping on orders over $75
- Sacramento Kings inspired black & gold aesthetic
- Shopify-powered storefront

## Links
- Website: https://crypticstore.lovable.app
- Shop: https://crypticstore.shop
